revision.comment: per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2024 April 21#Category:Redirects from translations]], update cat
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
|name=From an alternative translation
|from=an alternative English [[translation]]
|to=a ''more common variation''
|info=The prevalent translation is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from alternative names}} category, so {{tl|R from alternative name}} should not be used with this template.
|main category=Redirects from alternative translations
|printworthy={{{printworthy|no}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
{{template:TemplateData header}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
|name=From an alternative translation
|from=an alternative English [[translation]]
|to=a ''more common variation''
|info=The prevalent translation is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from alternative names}} category, so {{tl|R from alternative name}} should not be used with this template.
|main category=Redirects from alternative translations
|printworthy={{{printworthy|no}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
{{template:TemplateData header}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
|name=From an alternative translation
|from=an alternative English [[:en:Translation|Translation]]
|to=a ''more common variation''
|info=The prevalent translation is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from alternative names}} category, so {{tl|R from alternative name}} should not be used with this template.
|main category=Redirects from alternative translations
|printworthy={{{printworthy|no}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
{{template:TemplateData header}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
|name=From an alternative translation
|from=an alternative English [[:en:Translation|Translation]]
|to=a ''more common variation''
|info=The prevalent translation is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from alternative names}} category, so {{tl|R from alternative name}} should not be used with this template.
|main category=Redirects from alternative translations
|printworthy={{{printworthy|no}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
{{template:TemplateData header}}
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
|name=From an alternative translation
|from=an alternative English [[:en:Translation|Translation]]
|to=a ''more common variation''
|info=The prevalent translation is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from alternative names}} category, so {{tl|R from alternative name}} should not be used with this template.
|main category=Redirects from alternative translations
|printworthy={{{printworthy|no}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
{{template:TemplateData header}}

revision.text:

|name=From an alternative translation

|to=a ''more common variation''

** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from alternative names}} category, so {{tl|R from alternative name}} should not be used with this template.

[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
|name=From an alternative translation
|from=an alternative English [[:en:Translation|Translation]]
|to=a ''more common variation''
|info=The prevalent translation is {{#if: {{{1|}}}|<big>{{maroon|{{{1|}}}}}</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from alternative names}} category, so {{tl|R from alternative name}} should not be used with this template.
|main category=Redirects from alternative translations
|printworthy={{{printworthy|no}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
{{template:TemplateData header}}
[[Category:Templates]]
